title: Firetalk Records
role_summary: Independent record label. Released alphabets' "ON CHAMPAGNE AND GREYHOUNDS" (2012).
body:
Independent record label founded in 2009. Released alphabets' *ON CHAMPAGNE AND GREYHOUNDS* (autumn 2012). The Bandcamp edition carries the slug `on-champagne-and-greyhounds-2`, suggesting Firetalk may have released two volumes or that the Bandcamp version was a sequel/updated release. The label has a broad experimental/indie catalog.

Note: Firetalk releasing alphabets material is a significant discovery — it means Colin's music had distribution beyond self-release, connecting him to a recognized experimental music label network.

## Sources
- [Firetalk Records official site](https://firetalkrecs.com/)
- [Firetalk Records — Discogs](https://www.discogs.com/label/2364499-Firetalk-Records)
- [alphabets Bandcamp — ON CHAMPAGNE AND GREYHOUNDS](https://alphabets.bandcamp.com/album/on-champagne-and-greyhounds-2)
